entry.title: Pemain Baru Muba Babel United Mulai Latihan

link.title: Pemain Baru Muba Babel United Mulai Latihan

entry.content:
MUSI BANYUASIN,KOMPAS.TV-Pemain anyar Muba Babel United, Ichsan Kurniawan, sudah mulai ikut berlatih bersama punggawa MBU lainnya sejak latihan perdana pertengahan pekan kemarin.
Sebelum memperkuat Muba Babel United, Ichsan, sebelumnya bersama Borneo FC.
Pemain yang juga pernah berseragam Sriwijaya FC ini mengaku, tidak terlalu kesulitan beradaptasi dengan pemain Muba Babel United lainnya. Karena beberapa pemain MBU saat ini, pernah bermain bersamanya di klub lain.
Musim perdananya bersama skuad Muba Babel United, Ichsan Kurniawan bertekad membawa timnya lolos ke Liga 1 musim depan.
#Liga2 #MusiBanyuasin #KompetisiSepakbola
entry.summary: MUSI BANYUASIN,KOMPAS.TV-Pemain anyar Muba Babel United, Ichsan Kurniawan, sudah mulai ikut berlatih bersama punggawa MBU lainnya sejak latihan perdana pertengahan pekan kemarin. Sebelum memperkuat Muba Babel United, Ichsan, sebelumnya bersama Borneo FC. Pemain yang juga pernah berseragam Sriwijaya FC ini mengaku, tidak terlalu kesulitan beradaptasi dengan pemain Muba Babel United lainnya. Karena beberapa pemain MBU saat ini, pernah bermain bersamanya di klub lain. Musim perdananya bersama skuad Muba Babel United, Ichsan Kurniawan bertekad membawa timnya lolos ke Liga 1 musim depan. #Liga2 #MusiBanyuasin #KompetisiSepakbola

entry.title: FAMÍLIA PÔNCIO: PASTOR MÁRCIO RESPONDE PERGUNTAS E REVELA QUE FOI EXPULSO DA CASA DE SAULO!

link.title: FAMÍLIA PÔNCIO: PASTOR MÁRCIO RESPONDE PERGUNTAS E REVELA QUE FOI EXPULSO DA CASA DE SAULO!

entry.content: Está sabendo da treta da #FamíliaPôncio? Pois é, o #PastorMárcio decidiu responder algumas perguntas em seu Instagram e até revelou que foi expulso da casa de #Saulo!
entry.summary: Está sabendo da treta da #FamíliaPôncio? Pois é, o #PastorMárcio decidiu responder algumas perguntas em seu Instagram e até revelou que foi expulso da casa de #Saulo!

entry.title: Famous train line that runs through a Thai market free of crowds

link.title: Famous train line that runs through a Thai market free of crowds

entry.content:
Footage shows Thailand’s famous railway market today without the usual crowds of tourists.
The Maeklong Railway Market - which has fresh food stalls lining the tracks - is normally packed every day with holidaymakers photographing the popular destination and posing for selfies.
However, the country’s borders have been closed to tourists since March 22. Popular destinations like the market, some 50km south west of Bangkok, are now free from crowds - giving the perfect view of trains passing through the stalls.
Footage shows how traders raise their parasols and scoop up the trays of food as trains arrive and leave the nearby station. Carriages even rattle by just inches from the food, which is then sold after.
The vehicles come within inches of vegetables and fish before leaving the market, also called the Talad Rom Hub market.
Five trains a day pass through the market, starting at 8:30am and ending in the afternoon.
Historians said that the market was established more than 100 years ago. When government officials ordered the building of a new line straight through the land, traders refused to move to a new location and continued using the area even while trains passed through.
One visitor writing on TripAdvisor said: ‘‘The first time you watch, you are engulfed with not getting hit by the train. Alas the traders are ever so careful to get you out of the way. Please make note that some of the other tourists are a bit stubborn.’’
Another added: ‘‘Witnessing the train driving at two feet of you and seeing all the stalls opening in front of the train and closing again after the last wagon has passed is something one can only experience here.
'’I had the privilege to be able to see this as one and only "tourist" on the site due to the COVID-19 virus. Generally the experience if spoiled due to the fact there are too many tourists who don’t respect the site and even stop the train by staying on the railway to take pictures. So, yes, absolutely super experience but I was lucky.’’
entry.summary: Footage shows Thailand’s famous railway market today without the usual crowds of tourists. The Maeklong Railway Market - which has fresh food stalls lining the tracks - is normally packed every day with holidaymakers photographing the popular destination and posing for selfies. However, the country’s borders have been closed to tourists since March 22. Popular destinations like the market, some 50km south west of Bangkok, are now free from crowds - giving the perfect view of trains passing through the stalls. Footage shows how traders raise their parasols and scoop up the trays of food as trains arrive and leave the nearby station. Carriages even rattle by just inches from the food, which is then sold after. The vehicles come within inches of vegetables and fish before leaving the market, also called the Talad Rom Hub market. Five trains a day pass through the market, starting at 8:30am and ending in the afternoon. Historians said that the market was established more than 100 years ago. When government officials ordered the building of a new line straight through the land, traders refused to move to a new location and continued using the area even while trains passed through. One visitor writing on TripAdvisor said: ‘‘The first time you watch, you are engulfed with not getting hit by the train. Alas the traders are ever so careful to get you out of the way. Please make note that some of the other tourists are a bit stubborn.’’ Another added: ‘‘Witnessing the train driving at two feet of you and seeing all the stalls opening in front of the train and closing again after the last wagon has passed is something one can only experience here. '’I had the privilege to be able to see this as one and only "tourist" on the site due to the COVID-19 virus. Generally the experience if spoiled due to the fact there are too many tourists who don’t respect the site and even stop the train by staying on the railway to take pictures. So, yes, absolutely super experience but I was lucky.’’

entry.title: Robin Gibb’s Blue Glass Mews by KTT with RJ Gibb & Andrew Eborn

link.title: Robin Gibb’s Blue Glass Mews by KTT with RJ Gibb & Andrew Eborn

entry.content:
Robin Gibb’s Blue Glass Mews by KTT - MUSE Club Limited Edition Classic BODDING’S STEAM-BASKET SPECS (aka STEAM-BASKETS)
BODDING’S STEAM BASKET SUNGLASSES ARE PRE-ORDER AND FOR THIS INCREDIBLE ONE OFF INTRODUCTORY PRICE YOU CAN SECURE YOURS NOW BY E-MAILING:
ktt@octopustv.com
AND YOU WILL BE SENT FURTHER DETAILS AS WELL AS YOUR MUSE CLUB MEMBERSHIP CONFIRMATION.
YOU CAN BUY THEM NOW FOR £99.99 HOWEVER ALL WHO E-MAIL US TO RESERVE A PAIR, WILL RECEIVE THEM FOR ONLY £88.88!
IN HONOUR OF THE LAST DAY IN AUGUST
BEAR IN MIND, AS EACH PAIR OF BODDING’S STEAM BASKETS, AS A BESPOKE, FLAGSHIP, MUSE CLUB CLASSIC DESIGN, IS MANUFACTURED ESPECIALLY PER-ORDER & SO WILL TAKE AN ESTIMATED 20 - 30 DAYS TO REACH YOU.
These are the eagerly anticipated Robin Gibb’s Blue Glass Mews by KTT Core Design MUSE Club Official STEAM BASKET shades aka the ‘STEAM BASKETS’ aka ‘BODDING’S BASKETS’.
They are a colander-frame, metallic, retro-style, round-lensed, Steampunk pair of beautiful and very cool shades, with anti-reflective & UV400 protected lenses.
As we’ve stated previously, we always strive, whenever & wherever possible, to make affordable to the many what is usually only affordable to the few. With these shades, which are normally between £150 - £300, we pulled strings & called in favours, as well as utilising some good old fashioned haggling, to slash the price down to just £99.99, an incredible ‘steal’ of an offer.
But all who reserve a pair now via e-mail, will receive a discount:
Based on Robin Gibb’s Ideal design for "Lennon-esque" Steampunk shades, however as these are a Limited Edition range, unlike our other ‘Core Design’ range our fantastic & very cool Gibby’s range, all designs in the MUSE Club ‘Steam-Basket Specs’ range afford the paying customer a MUSE Club membership & of course all of the benefits a MUSE Club membership has to offer.
The Steam-Basket range also includes our second of 3 Flagship designs, our:
MUSE Club Flagship No.7 Bodding’s Blue Steam-Basket Specs (the M7 design) aka ‘Bodding’s Blue Baskets’
Which happens to be the ‘Sister’ Flagship of 2 other designs in our Gibby’s range:
Gibby’s Flagship No.2 ‘Bodding’s Blues’ (the G2 design).
& our Hexagon Specs range
Both designs being the result of Robin & his son RJ’s design brainstorming "jam sessions" during their breaks in-between recording at Redbreast Record’s own Coronation Studios (full name Coronation Room Studios) which took place there over roughly a 5 year period from 2007 - 2012. Robin kept designing right until the end of his amazing life, even from his hospital bed would he sketch & write down notes detailing all sorts of designs & not just for sunglasses. Over time we’ll be revealing as many of those specific designs we can manufacture or source.
Fittingly, we’ve included a new lens colour ‘tea-tints’ in honour of Robin’s favourite drink. He loved a nice hot cup at close of day
ADDITIONAL INFO:
Brand Name: KTT’s RGBG Mews MUSE Club **Class
entry.summary: Robin Gibb’s Blue Glass Mews by KTT - MUSE Club Limited Edition Classic BODDING’S STEAM-BASKET SPECS (aka STEAM-BASKETS) BODDING’S STEAM BASKET SUNGLASSES ARE PRE-ORDER AND FOR THIS INCREDIBLE ONE OFF INTRODUCTORY PRICE YOU CAN SECURE YOURS NOW BY E-MAILING: ktt@octopustv.com AND YOU WILL BE SENT FURTHER DETAILS AS WELL AS YOUR MUSE CLUB MEMBERSHIP CONFIRMATION. YOU CAN BUY THEM NOW FOR £99.99 HOWEVER ALL WHO E-MAIL US TO RESERVE A PAIR, WILL RECEIVE THEM FOR ONLY £88.88! IN HONOUR OF THE LAST DAY IN AUGUST BEAR IN MIND, AS EACH PAIR OF BODDING’S STEAM BASKETS, AS A BESPOKE, FLAGSHIP, MUSE CLUB CLASSIC DESIGN, IS MANUFACTURED ESPECIALLY PER-ORDER & SO WILL TAKE AN ESTIMATED 20 - 30 DAYS TO REACH YOU. These are the eagerly anticipated Robin Gibb’s Blue Glass Mews by KTT Core Design MUSE Club Official STEAM BASKET shades aka the ‘STEAM BASKETS’ aka ‘BODDING’S BASKETS’. They are a colander-frame, metallic, retro-style, round-lensed, Steampunk pair of beautiful and very cool shades, with anti-reflective & UV400 protected lenses. As we’ve stated previously, we always strive, whenever & wherever possible, to make affordable to the many what is usually only affordable to the few. With these shades, which are normally between £150 - £300, we pulled strings & called in favours, as well as utilising some good old fashioned haggling, to slash the price down to just £99.99, an incredible ‘steal’ of an offer. But all who reserve a pair now via e-mail, will receive a discount: Based on Robin Gibb’s Ideal design for "Lennon-esque" Steampunk shades, however as these are a Limited Edition range, unlike our other ‘Core Design’ range our fantastic & very cool Gibby’s range, all designs in the MUSE Club ‘Steam-Basket Specs’ range afford the paying customer a MUSE Club membership & of course all of the benefits a MUSE Club membership has to offer. The Steam-Basket range also includes our second of 3 Flagship designs, our: MUSE Club Flagship No.7 Bodding’s Blue Steam-Basket Specs (the M7 design) aka ‘Bodding’s Blue Baskets’ Which happens to be the ‘Sister’ Flagship of 2 other designs in our Gibby’s range: Gibby’s Flagship No.2 ‘Bodding’s Blues’ (the G2 design). & our Hexagon Specs range Both designs being the result of Robin & his son RJ’s design brainstorming "jam sessions" during their breaks in-between recording at Redbreast Record’s own Coronation Studios (full name Coronation Room Studios) which took place there over roughly a 5 year period from 2007 - 2012. Robin kept designing right until the end of his amazing life, even from his hospital bed would he sketch & write down notes detailing all sorts of designs & not just for sunglasses. Over time we’ll be revealing as many of those specific designs we can manufacture or source. Fittingly, we’ve included a new lens colour ‘tea-tints’ in honour of Robin’s favourite drink. He loved a nice hot cup at close of day ADDITIONAL INFO: Brand Name: KTT’s RGBG Mews MUSE Club **Class

entry.title: ‘Mourir peut attendre’ : découvrez les images inédites du nouveau James Bond

link.title: ‘Mourir peut attendre’ : découvrez les images inédites du nouveau James Bond

entry.content: La bande-annonce explosive du 25e opus de James Bond vient d’être dévoilée. "Mourir peut attendre" sort en salles le 11 novembre prochain.
entry.summary: La bande-annonce explosive du 25e opus de James Bond vient d’être dévoilée. "Mourir peut attendre" sort en salles le 11 novembre prochain.

entry.title: Cour de l’école Marc-André-Fortier à l’ère de la COVID-19

link.title: Cour de l’école Marc-André-Fortier à l’ère de la COVID-19

entry.content: Des carrés ont été dessinés dans la cours de l’école Marc-André-Fortier à Châteauguay, afin de regrouper les classes. De plus, les élèves doivent se placer sur des points peints à un mètre les uns des autres.
entry.summary: Des carrés ont été dessinés dans la cours de l’école Marc-André-Fortier à Châteauguay, afin de regrouper les classes. De plus, les élèves doivent se placer sur des points peints à un mètre les uns des autres.

entry.title: Mumtaz Menilai Ada Pembisik Amien Rais, Jadi Latar belakang PAN Reformasi

link.title: Mumtaz Menilai Ada Pembisik Amien Rais, Jadi Latar belakang PAN Reformasi

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Putra Amien Rais, Ahmad Mumtaz Raiz menuding ada pembisik di sekitar Amien Rais yang melatarbelakangi inisiatif pembentukan "PAN Reformasi".
Mumtaz menilai, gagasan pembentukan "PAN Reformasi" bukan dari pemikiran politisi senior PAN, Amien Rais.
"Kita ini PAN asli sudah 22 tahun, dan saya sebagai pelaku utamanya yang memimpin sidang di setiap wilayah itu ngerasa capek, muter nggak ada waktu buat tidur leyeh-leyeh, nggak ada. Itu memakan waktu yang bertahun-tahun. Kok mereka koar-koar mau bikin PAN Reformasi," ujar Mumtaz kepada KompasTV, Selasa (02/09/2020).
"Saya akan berenang dari Pantai Kapuk sampai Labuan Bajo jika jelas ya syaratnya ya, jika pada Desember nanti mereka berhasil mendeklarasikan PAN Reformasi itu secara sah dari struktur 34 wilayah, harus ada verifikasinya dan diisi oleh 1/4 1.500 anggota dewan kita," lanjutnya.
Putra Amien Rais juga menegaskan sebagai partai modern, Partai Amanat Nasional (PAN) tidak pernah mengultuskan Amien Rais yang menjadi pendiri PAN.
Mumtaz mengibaratkan, Amien Rais adalah pemegang BPKB sebuah kendaraan sementara STNK-nya diputar ke beberapa orang yang kini Partai Amanat Nasional (PAN)
"Jika diibaratkan partai ini seperti sebuah kendaraan, STNK-nya itu lumrah dan biasa saja dan berpindah-pindah. Tapi BPKB-nya itu masih Pak Amien yang pegang. Kita hormat BPKB kendaraan politik partai Amanat Nasional ini adalah Pak Amien punya," paparnya.
Tayangan selengkapnya, wawancara pemimpin redaksi KompasTV Rosiana Silalahi dengan Ahmad Mumtaz Rais, bisa Anda saksikan di "Kamar Rosi" yang tayang di channel YouTube KompasTV.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Putra Amien Rais, Ahmad Mumtaz Raiz menuding ada pembisik di sekitar Amien Rais yang melatarbelakangi inisiatif pembentukan "PAN Reformasi". Mumtaz menilai, gagasan pembentukan "PAN Reformasi" bukan dari pemikiran politisi senior PAN, Amien Rais. "Kita ini PAN asli sudah 22 tahun, dan saya sebagai pelaku utamanya yang memimpin sidang di setiap wilayah itu ngerasa capek, muter nggak ada waktu buat tidur leyeh-leyeh, nggak ada. Itu memakan waktu yang bertahun-tahun. Kok mereka koar-koar mau bikin PAN Reformasi," ujar Mumtaz kepada KompasTV, Selasa (02/09/2020). "Saya akan berenang dari Pantai Kapuk sampai Labuan Bajo jika jelas ya syaratnya ya, jika pada Desember nanti mereka berhasil mendeklarasikan PAN Reformasi itu secara sah dari struktur 34 wilayah, harus ada verifikasinya dan diisi oleh 1/4 1.500 anggota dewan kita," lanjutnya. Putra Amien Rais juga menegaskan sebagai partai modern, Partai Amanat Nasional (PAN) tidak pernah mengultuskan Amien Rais yang menjadi pendiri PAN. Mumtaz mengibaratkan, Amien Rais adalah pemegang BPKB sebuah kendaraan sementara STNK-nya diputar ke beberapa orang yang kini Partai Amanat Nasional (PAN) "Jika diibaratkan partai ini seperti sebuah kendaraan, STNK-nya itu lumrah dan biasa saja dan berpindah-pindah. Tapi BPKB-nya itu masih Pak Amien yang pegang. Kita hormat BPKB kendaraan politik partai Amanat Nasional ini adalah Pak Amien punya," paparnya. Tayangan selengkapnya, wawancara pemimpin redaksi KompasTV Rosiana Silalahi dengan Ahmad Mumtaz Rais, bisa Anda saksikan di "Kamar Rosi" yang tayang di channel YouTube KompasTV.

entry.title: 10 Korean Celebrities Who Are the Face of Luxury Fashion Brands Preview 10 PREVIEW

link.title: 10 Korean Celebrities Who Are the Face of Luxury Fashion Brands Preview 10 PREVIEW

entry.content:
A celebrity endorser can either make or break a brand. Who endorses what and when isn’t a very simple equation, and brands carefully take time to pick their ambassadors. So for luxury brands, the process of selecting an endorser is even more meticulous. Fashion houses like Chanel, Louis Vuitton, Dior, and Gucci to name a few take pride on who their wears their clothes and associates themselves with individuals who they believe can properly convey their label’s design philosophy and lifestyle.
So with the evident rise of Korean actors, actresses and K-pop stars, it’s not surprising that these designer fashion brands have recently been more inclined to tap a hallyu star to flaunt their latest collections. In this episode of Preview 10, we list down 10 Korean celebrities who are ambassadors of well-known global luxury fashion brands.
entry.summary: A celebrity endorser can either make or break a brand. Who endorses what and when isn’t a very simple equation, and brands carefully take time to pick their ambassadors. So for luxury brands, the process of selecting an endorser is even more meticulous. Fashion houses like Chanel, Louis Vuitton, Dior, and Gucci to name a few take pride on who their wears their clothes and associates themselves with individuals who they believe can properly convey their label’s design philosophy and lifestyle. So with the evident rise of Korean actors, actresses and K-pop stars, it’s not surprising that these designer fashion brands have recently been more inclined to tap a hallyu star to flaunt their latest collections. In this episode of Preview 10, we list down 10 Korean celebrities who are ambassadors of well-known global luxury fashion brands.

entry.title: Aadhaar Updation : UIDAI के नए नियम, Aadhaar Update के लिए चुकाने होंगे इतने रुपये । वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Aadhaar Updation : UIDAI के नए नियम, Aadhaar Update के लिए चुकाने होंगे इतने रुपये । वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Aadhaar is one of the most important identity and address proof documents in India. Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI), the agency which oversees the 12-digit ID verification platform, recently shared the mechanism to get demographics or biometric details updated in the Aadhaar card, if needed.
आधार कार्ड अपडेट कराने वालों के लिए ये खबर है। अब अगर आपको अपना आधार कार्ड अपडेट कराना है तो इसके लिए आपको खर्च करना पड़ेगा। अब ये सेवा फ्री में नहीं मिलेगी। जी हां जहां आप पहले आधार में कुछ भी अपडेट कराते थे तो कोई चार्ज नहीं लगता था लेकिन अब इसके लिए खर्च करने होंगे पैसे।
#aadhaarcard #UIDAI #adhaarVirtualID
entry.summary: Aadhaar is one of the most important identity and address proof documents in India. Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI), the agency which oversees the 12-digit ID verification platform, recently shared the mechanism to get demographics or biometric details updated in the Aadhaar card, if needed. आधार कार्ड अपडेट कराने वालों के लिए ये खबर है। अब अगर आपको अपना आधार कार्ड अपडेट कराना है तो इसके लिए आपको खर्च करना पड़ेगा। अब ये सेवा फ्री में नहीं मिलेगी। जी हां जहां आप पहले आधार में कुछ भी अपडेट कराते थे तो कोई चार्ज नहीं लगता था लेकिन अब इसके लिए खर्च करने होंगे पैसे। #aadhaarcard #UIDAI #adhaarVirtualID

entry.title: Janasena మేనిఫెస్టో హామీ కి.. నూతన విద్యా విధానం 2020 లో చోటు ! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Janasena మేనిఫెస్టో హామీ కి.. నూతన విద్యా విధానం 2020 లో చోటు ! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
New Education Policy: Anganwadi workers to impart pre-primary education to kids.
According to the authorities, anganwadi workers would be provided training to educate the children as it is done in playschools and the programme is expected to start by the next session.
#Janasena
#JanasenaParty
#Pawankalyan
#Neweducationpolicy
#Neweducationpolicy2020
#Anganwadi
#Nep2020
సమగ్రంగా పరిశీలించిన తరువాతే జనసేన మానిఫెస్టోలో హామీలను పొందుపర్చారు .అంగన్వాడీ పాఠశాలల్ని ప్లే స్కూల్స్ గా మారుస్తామని హామీ ఇచ్చారు - నూతన విద్యా విధానంలో కూడా ఇదే ప్రస్తావించారు,కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం అమలు పర్చనుంది
entry.summary: New Education Policy: Anganwadi workers to impart pre-primary education to kids. According to the authorities, anganwadi workers would be provided training to educate the children as it is done in playschools and the programme is expected to start by the next session. #Janasena #JanasenaParty #Pawankalyan #Neweducationpolicy #Neweducationpolicy2020 #Anganwadi #Nep2020 సమగ్రంగా పరిశీలించిన తరువాతే జనసేన మానిఫెస్టోలో హామీలను పొందుపర్చారు .అంగన్వాడీ పాఠశాలల్ని ప్లే స్కూల్స్ గా మారుస్తామని హామీ ఇచ్చారు - నూతన విద్యా విధానంలో కూడా ఇదే ప్రస్తావించారు,కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం అమలు పర్చనుంది

entry.title: Victor Meutelet (Grand Hôtel) : ses tatouages dans la série sont-ils vrais ?

link.title: Victor Meutelet (Grand Hôtel) : ses tatouages dans la série sont-ils vrais ?

entry.content:
Victor Meutelet (Grand Hôtel) : ses tatouages dans la série sont-ils vrais ?.
Ce jeudi 3 septembre, TF1 lance sa toute nouvelle saga intitulée Grand Hôtel, à 21h05. .
Dans son casting de haute volée, figure 
un jeune homme du nom de Victor Meutelet. .
Les téléspectateurs le connaissent bien, puisque Victor Meutelet était déjà à l’affiche d’une autre série de TF1, Le Bazar de la charité. .
Cette fois-ci, le jeune homme joue le rôle d’Anthony Costa, un serveur qui arrive au Grand Hôtel, dont le but est en réalité de retrouver sa sœur disparue.
Il est bien plus impulsif que moi. J’admire son courage,
il faut vraiment en avoir pour chercher sa sœur à tout prix dans cet environnement-là, Victor Meutelet .
Il y a autre chose que Victor Meutelet ne partage pas avec son personnage Anthony : les tatouages. .
Ils sont faux, j’avais une heure de maquillage de plus que les autres lorsque je tournais des scènes torse nu. , Victor Meutelet
entry.summary: Victor Meutelet (Grand Hôtel) : ses tatouages dans la série sont-ils vrais ?. Ce jeudi 3 septembre, TF1 lance sa toute nouvelle saga intitulée Grand Hôtel, à 21h05. . Dans son casting de haute volée, figure un jeune homme du nom de Victor Meutelet. . Les téléspectateurs le connaissent bien, puisque Victor Meutelet était déjà à l’affiche d’une autre série de TF1, Le Bazar de la charité. . Cette fois-ci, le jeune homme joue le rôle d’Anthony Costa, un serveur qui arrive au Grand Hôtel, dont le but est en réalité de retrouver sa sœur disparue. Il est bien plus impulsif que moi. J’admire son courage, il faut vraiment en avoir pour chercher sa sœur à tout prix dans cet environnement-là, Victor Meutelet . Il y a autre chose que Victor Meutelet ne partage pas avec son personnage Anthony : les tatouages. . Ils sont faux, j’avais une heure de maquillage de plus que les autres lorsque je tournais des scènes torse nu. , Victor Meutelet

entry.title: Americaவை முந்திய China! Pentagon அதிர்ச்சி Report

link.title: Americaவை முந்திய China! Pentagon அதிர்ச்சி Report

entry.content:
சீனா இந்தோ பசிபிக் பகுதிகளில் 12 நாடுகளில் தனது ராணுவத்தை அதிகரிக்க திட்டமிட்டு இருப்பதாக அமெரிக்க காங்கிரஸ் சபையில் தாக்கல் செய்த அறிக்கையில் பென்டகன் தெரிவித்துள்ளது.
Pentagon report on china’s strength in Army and navy and warns India
entry.summary: சீனா இந்தோ பசிபிக் பகுதிகளில் 12 நாடுகளில் தனது ராணுவத்தை அதிகரிக்க திட்டமிட்டு இருப்பதாக அமெரிக்க காங்கிரஸ் சபையில் தாக்கல் செய்த அறிக்கையில் பென்டகன் தெரிவித்துள்ளது. Pentagon report on china’s strength in Army and navy and warns India

entry.title: Naomi Campbell: Chadwick Boseman was a humble being

link.title: Naomi Campbell: Chadwick Boseman was a humble being

entry.content: Naomi Campbell says Chadwick Boseman was a "selfless" and "humble being", as she said his death has left "the world in shock".
entry.summary: Naomi Campbell says Chadwick Boseman was a "selfless" and "humble being", as she said his death has left "the world in shock".

entry.title: Buru Uang Rp 75 Ribu Edisi Kemerdekaan Bisa Pakai Jalur Kolektif

link.title: Buru Uang Rp 75 Ribu Edisi Kemerdekaan Bisa Pakai Jalur Kolektif

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Para pemburu uang edisi khusus 75 Tahun Kemerdekaan Republik Indonesia jangan patah semangat. Kehilangan kesempatan saat awal pendaftaran online, warga bisa lanjut mengikuti sistem penukaran kolektif.
Gedung Bank Indonesia Jakarta masih ramai dengan penukaran uang peringatan kemerdekaan 75 tahun. Dan kini, kesempatan memperoleh uang edisi terbatas itu lebih lebar.
Pasalnya, Bank Indonesia kini menerapkan sistem penukaran kolektif. Satu orang atau per Kartu Tanda Penduduk bisa mewakili minimal 17 orang.
Cukup dengan mengunduh formulir permohonan penukaran dan formulir daftar pemesanan di situs pintar.bi.go.id, nantinya jadwal penukaran uang akan dikirimkan via email.
Namun, jangan coba-coba bagi kamu yang sudah mendapatkan uang pecahan Rp 75 ribu ini untuk mendaftar kembali. Setiap orang hanya berhak mendapatkan satu lembar saja.
Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar kamu semua tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Para pemburu uang edisi khusus 75 Tahun Kemerdekaan Republik Indonesia jangan patah semangat. Kehilangan kesempatan saat awal pendaftaran online, warga bisa lanjut mengikuti sistem penukaran kolektif. Gedung Bank Indonesia Jakarta masih ramai dengan penukaran uang peringatan kemerdekaan 75 tahun. Dan kini, kesempatan memperoleh uang edisi terbatas itu lebih lebar. Pasalnya, Bank Indonesia kini menerapkan sistem penukaran kolektif. Satu orang atau per Kartu Tanda Penduduk bisa mewakili minimal 17 orang. Cukup dengan mengunduh formulir permohonan penukaran dan formulir daftar pemesanan di situs pintar.bi.go.id, nantinya jadwal penukaran uang akan dikirimkan via email. Namun, jangan coba-coba bagi kamu yang sudah mendapatkan uang pecahan Rp 75 ribu ini untuk mendaftar kembali. Setiap orang hanya berhak mendapatkan satu lembar saja. Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar kamu semua tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.

entry.title: Gironde : des fêtards suspectés d’avoir transmis volontairement le virus

link.title: Gironde : des fêtards suspectés d’avoir transmis volontairement le virus

entry.content: Les autorités ont martelé le message tout au long de l’été. En cas de rassemblement, le maintien des gestes barrières est primordial pour éviter la contamination ou la formation de clusters. « Les déplacements, événements et regroupements familiaux ou amicaux sont des facteurs susceptibles de favoriser la reprise de l’épidémie », rappelait la Direction générale de la santé le 20 juillet. Une fête privée est ainsi dans le viseur des autorités sanitaires, explique « Sud Ouest ».
entry.summary: Les autorités ont martelé le message tout au long de l’été. En cas de rassemblement, le maintien des gestes barrières est primordial pour éviter la contamination ou la formation de clusters. « Les déplacements, événements et regroupements familiaux ou amicaux sont des facteurs susceptibles de favoriser la reprise de l’épidémie », rappelait la Direction générale de la santé le 20 juillet. Une fête privée est ainsi dans le viseur des autorités sanitaires, explique « Sud Ouest ».

entry.title: Chanel Rosa hace autocrítica sobre lucha contra el Covid

link.title: Chanel Rosa hace autocrítica sobre lucha contra el Covid

entry.content: A 15 días de haber dejado atrás una labor de más de dos años y cuatro meses manejando la red hospita­laria pública y con un pe­so corporal que refleja 40 libras menos, muchas de ellas como secuelas de ha­ber padecido Covid, Cha­nel Rosa Chupany acu­mula una larga lista de lecciones aprendidas y de­talla los fallos y dificulta­des que marcaron la res­puesta sanitaria.
entry.summary: A 15 días de haber dejado atrás una labor de más de dos años y cuatro meses manejando la red hospita­laria pública y con un pe­so corporal que refleja 40 libras menos, muchas de ellas como secuelas de ha­ber padecido Covid, Cha­nel Rosa Chupany acu­mula una larga lista de lecciones aprendidas y de­talla los fallos y dificulta­des que marcaron la res­puesta sanitaria.

entry.title: Beyond Meat Now Offering Direct Online

link.title: Beyond Meat Now Offering Direct Online

entry.content:
On Thursday, Beyond Meat launched an online portal for buying its products directly.
The company plans to use the platform to test out new items.
The packages of faux meat will cost you between $50 and $72.
Customers will have a variety of options for trying out Beyond’s burger, sausage, and beef.
The company’s chief growth officer, Charles Muth, told Gizmodo they will use the website to introduce new products and gather customer feedback.
In a press release, Beyond Meat said that orders will be shipped in a recyclable box via UPS carbon neutral shipping.
entry.summary: On Thursday, Beyond Meat launched an online portal for buying its products directly. The company plans to use the platform to test out new items. The packages of faux meat will cost you between $50 and $72. Customers will have a variety of options for trying out Beyond’s burger, sausage, and beef. The company’s chief growth officer, Charles Muth, told Gizmodo they will use the website to introduce new products and gather customer feedback. In a press release, Beyond Meat said that orders will be shipped in a recyclable box via UPS carbon neutral shipping.
